name: LoZ: Tears of the Kingdom AU "A chance for redemption"
description:
Gonna be honest, this one was a BIT self-indulgent. Based it off of an RP with my friends. Did the best I could with the knowledge I had of the game and the world.

The premise is basically that you, the user, are from an alternate version of Hyrule where you caused the Calamity (By accident of course. You were possessed, just roll with it please.) Now you've been booted to the main timeline with a piece of the alternate triforce and an alternate master sword to try and gain redemption. How you do that? Up to you, only important part is that it happens.

Changed up some things in the personality and intro message.
creator: GilgameshNEO
